card-base: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 overflow-hidden
glass: bg-white/70 dark:bg-slate-900/70 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 dark:border-slate-700/50
footer-root: bg-white dark:bg-slate-950 border-t border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 pt-20 pb-10
social-icon: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-900 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-emerald-500 hover:text-white transition-all
btn-ghost: text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-400 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800
btn-primary: bg-emerald-500 dark:bg-emerald-600 text-white shadow-glow hover:bg-emerald-600 dark:hover:bg-emerald-500
surface-alt: bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-950 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-inner rounded-2xl
bottom-nav: bg-white/90 dark:bg-slate-950/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 rounded-t-[2rem]
sidebar: bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 border-r border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100
glow-card: bg-slate-900 dark:bg-black border border-slate-800 dark:border-slate-700 shadow-glow rounded-2xl
floating-card: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl
blur-orb: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-96 h-96 bg-emerald-500/20 rounded-full blur-3xl
emerald-full: bg-emerald-500 dark:bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 dark:border-emerald-700 text-white rounded-full
emerald-lg: bg-emerald-500 dark:bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 dark:border-emerald-700 text-white rounded-lg
card: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-3xl
card-featured: bg-gray-900 dark:bg-black border-2 border-emerald-500 shadow-glow text-white rounded-[3rem]
